i < kAtoms; i++)\n780:         {\n781:             tA[i] = buffer_load_dwordx4(src_buffer.descriptor, src_offset, 0, 0);\n782:             src_offset += kAtomStride * sizeof(int32x4_t);\n783:             if constexpr(cast_bf2half)\n784:             {\n785:                 const nv_bfloat162* bf_buf = reinterpret_cast<const nv_bfloat162*>(&tA[i]);\n786:                 half2 half_buf[4];\n787: #pragma unroll\n788:                 for(int j = 0; j < 4; ++j)\n789:                 {\n790:                     float2 f    = __bfloat1622float2(bf_buf[j]);\n791:                     half_buf[j] = __float22half2_rn(f);\n792:                 }\n793:                 tA[i] = *reinterpret_cast<const int32x4_t*>(half_buf);\n794:             }\n795:         }\n796: \n797:         // --------------------------------------------------------\n798:         // Phase-1A: Write segment data into the communication buffer of the target\n799:         // rank responsible for this segment.\n800:         uint32_t comm_data0_offset = data_offset + block_id * Codec::kTransmittedTileSize;\n801:         uint32_t comm_data1_offset = data_size_per_phase + comm_data0_offset;\n802: \n803:         uint32_t comm_flags0_offset = block_id * (kWorldSize * sizeof(uint32_t));\n804:         uint32_t comm_flags1_offset = (data_offset / 2) + comm_flags0_offset;\n805: \n806:         for(int r = 0; r < kWorldSize; r++)\n830:             {\n831:                 // Wait for the flags to be set.\n832:                 if(thread == 0)\n833:                 {\n834:                     wait_sync_flag(&flag_ptr[r], flag_color);\n835:                 }\n836:                 __syncthreads();\n837: \n838:                 // note: we reuse tA as temp buffer here\n839:                 codec.recv(&recv_buffer, tA);\n840: \n841:                 for(int i = 0; i < Codec::kRankAtoms; i++)\n842:                 {\n843:                     packed_assign_add<T>(&tR[i], &tA[i]);\n844:                 }\n845:             }\n846:         }\n847: \n848:         // Phase-2: Write the reduced segment to every other rank\n849:         for(int r = 0; r < kWorldSize; r++)\n850:         {\n851:             int32x4_t* send_buffer = reinterpret_cast<int32x4_t*>(\n852:                 buffer_ptr[r] + comm_data1_offset + rank * Codec::kRankTransmittedTileSize);\n853:             codec.send(send_buffer, tR);\n854:         }\n855: \n856:         __syncthreads();\n857:         if(thread < kWorldSize)\n858:         {\n859:             int r              = thread;\n860:             uint32_t* flag_ptr = reinterpret_cast<uint32_t*>(buffer_ptr[r] + comm_flags1_offset +\n861:                                                              rank * sizeof(uint32_t));\n862:             set_sync_flag(flag_ptr, flag_color);\n863:         }\n864: \n865:         // Phase-2: Read the gather segments from the rank's communication buffer.\n866:         {\n867:             // Read the data from the communication buffer.\n868:             int32x4_t* recv_buffer = reinterpret_cast<int32x4_t*>(rank_buffer + comm_data1_offset);\n869:             uint32_t* flag_ptr     = reinterpret_cast<uint32_t*>(rank_buffer + comm_flags1_offset);\n870: \n871:             for(int r = 0; residual_out = allreduced + residual\n    variance = residual_out.float().pow(2).mean(dim=-1, keepdim=True)\n    out = residual_out.float() * torch.rsqrt(variance + eps) * weight.float()\n    return out.to(allreduced.dtype), residual_out.to(allreduced.dtype)\n\n\ndef _qr_rmsnorm_worker(\n    rank: int,\n    world_size: int,\n    inputs: list[torch.Tensor],\n    residuals: list[torch.Tensor],\n ptr = None\n    try:\n        dist.init_process_group(\n            backend=\"nccl\",\n            init_method=distributed_init_method,\n            rank=rank,\n            world_size=world_size,\n        )\n        group = dist.new_group(list(range(world_size)), backend=\"nccl\")\n\n        ptr = ops.init_custom_qr(rank, world_size, None)\n        handle = ops.qr_get_handle(ptr)\n        handles = [None] * world_size\n        dist.all_gather_object(handles, handle, group=group)\n        ops.qr_open_handles(ptr, handles)\n\n        inp = inputs[rank].to(device)\n        residual = residuals[rank].to(device)\n        weight = weight.to(device)\n        out = torch.empty_like(inp)\n        residual_out = torch.empty_like(residual)\n\n        # Align ranks before launching the custom IPC kernel.\n        dist.all_reduce(torch.zeros(1, device=device), group=group)\n        torch.cuda.synchronize()\n\n        ops.qr_all_reduce_rmsnorm(\n            ptr,\n            inp,\n            residual,\n            residual_out,\n            out,\n            weight,\n            eps,\n            inp.shape[-1],\n            0,  # QuickReduceRegime.FP\n            False,\n        )\n        torch.cuda.synchronize()\n        return out.cpu(), residual_out.cpu()\n    finally:\n        if ptr is not None:\n            ops.qr_destroy(ptr)\n        if dist.is_initialized():\n            dist.destroy_process_group()\n        torch.cuda.empty_cache()\n\n\n@pytest.mark.skipif(torch.cuda.device_count() < 2, reason=\"requires at least 2 GPUs\")\n@pytest.mark.parametrize(\"dtype\", [torch.float16, torch.bfloat16])\ndef test_qr_all_reduce_rmsnorm_matches_torch_reference(dtype: torch.dtype):\n    world_size = 2\n    hidden_dim = 4096\n    tokens = 256\n    eps = 1e-6\n\n    generator = torch.Generator().manual_seed(1234)\n    inputs = [\n        torch.randn((tokens, hidden_dim), dtype=dtype, generator=generator) * 0.1\n        for _ in range(world_size)\n    ]\n    residuals = [\n        torch.randn((tokens, hidden_dim), dtype=dtype, generator=generator) * 0.1\n        for _ in range(world_size)\n    ]\n    weight = torch.randn((hidden_dim,), dtype=dtype, generator=generator) * 0.1\n\n    allreduced = torch.stack(inputs).sum(dim=0)\n    refs = [\n        _rmsnorm_reference(allreduced, residuals[rank], weight, eps)\n        for rank in range(world_size)\n    ]\n\n    distributed_init_method = get_distributed_init_method(get_ip(), get_open_port())\n    ctx = mp.get_context(\"spawn\")\n    with ctx.Pool(processes=world_size) as pool:\n        rets = [\n            pool.apply_async(\n                _qr_rmsnorm_worker,\n                args=(\n                    rank,\n                    world_size,\n                    inputs,\n                    residuals,\n                    weight,\n                    eps,\n                    distributed_init_method,\n                ),\n            )\n            for rank in range(world_size)\n        ]\n        results = [ret.get(timeout=120) for ret in rets]\n\n    rtol = 5e-3 if dtype == torch.float16 else 4e-2\n    atol = 5e-3 if dtype == torch.float16 else 4e-2\n    for (out, residual_out), (ref_out, ref_residual_out) in zip(results, refs):\n        torch.testing.assert_close(\n            residual_out.float(),\n            ref_residual_out.float(),\n            rtol=rtol,\n            atol=atol,\n        )\n        torch.testing.assert_close(\n            out.float(),\n            ref_out.float(),\n            rtol=rtol,\n            atol=atol,\n        )","lineStart":1,"lineEnd":144,"totalLines":144,"truncated":false}},"title":"app/aiter/op_tests/multigpu_tests/test_quick_all_reduce_rmsnorm.py","time":{"start":1784414987905,"end":1784414987910}},"id":"prt_f776be67d001rDjJR8mAafpExY","sessionID":"ses_088953fe5ffenAXvBM3qI45Ue3","messageID":"msg_f776bdca6001plgDH1Af51t53D"}}

r < kWorldSize; r++)\n+        {\n+            int32x4_t* send_buffer = reinterpret_cast<int32x4_t*>(\n+                buffer_ptr[r] + comm_data0_offset + rank * Codec::kRankTransmittedTileSize);\n+            codec.send(send_buffer, &tA[r * Codec::kRankAtoms]);\n+        }\n+\n+        __syncthreads();\n+        if(thread < kWorldSize)\n+        {\n+            int r              = thread;\n+            uint32_t* flag_ptr = reinterpret_cast<uint32_t*>(buffer_ptr[r] + comm_flags0_offset +\n+                                                             rank * sizeof(uint32_t));\n+            set_sync_flag(flag_ptr, flag_color);\n+        }\n+        // --------------------------------------------------------\n+        // Phase-1B: Reduce the segment data from the communication buffers.\n+        int32x4_t tR[Codec::kRankAtoms] = {};\n+        {\n+            // Read the data from the communication buffer.\n+            int32x4_t* recv_buffer = reinterpret_cast<int32x4_t*>(rank_buffer + comm_data0_offset);\n+            uint32_t* flag_ptr     = reinterpret_cast<uint32_t*>(rank_buffer + comm_flags0_offset);\n+\n+            for(int r = 0; r < kWorldSize; r++)\n+            {\n+                // Wait for the flags to be set.\n+                if(thread == 0)\n+                {\n+                    wait_sync_flag(&flag_ptr[r], flag_color);\n+                }\n+                __syncthreads();\n+\n+                // note: we reuse tA as temp buffer here\n+                codec.recv(&recv_buffer, tA);\n+\n+                for(int i = 0; i < Codec::kRankAtoms; i++)\n+                {\n+                    packed_assign_add<CommT>(&tR[i], &tA[i]);\n+                }\n+            }\n+        }\n+\n+        // Phase-2: Write the reduced segment to every other rank\n+        for(int r = 0; r < kWorldSize; r++)\n+        {\n+            int32x4_t* send_buffer = reinterpret_cast<int32x4_t*>(\n+                buffer_ptr[r] + comm_data1_offset + rank * Codec::kRankTransmittedTileSize);\n+            codec.send(send_buffer, tR);\n+        }\n+\n+        __syncthreads();\n+        if(thread < kWorldSize)\n+        {\n+            int r              = thread;\n+            uint32_t* flag_ptr = reinterpret_cast<uint32_t*>(buffer_ptr[r] + comm_flags1_offset +\n+                                                             rank * sizeof(uint32_t));\n+            set_sync_flag(flag_ptr, flag_color);\n+        }\n+\n+        // Phase-2: Read the gather segments from the rank's communication buffer.\n+        {\n+            // Read the data from the communication buffer.\n+            int32x4_t* recv_buffer = reinterpret_cast<int32x4_t*>(rank_buffer + comm_data1_offset);\n+            uint32_t* flag_ptr     = reinterpret_cast<uint32_t*>(rank_buffer + comm_flags1_offset);\n+\n+            for(int r = 0; r < kWorldSize; r++)\n+            {\n+                // Wait for the flags to be set.\n+                if(thread == 0)\n+                {\n+                    wait_sync_flag(&flag_ptr[r], flag_color);\n+                }\n+                __syncthreads();\n+\n+                // Gather all reduced and final rank segments into tA.\n+                codec.recv(&recv_buffer, &tA[r * Codec::kRankAtoms]);\n+            }\n+        }\n+\n+        // --------------------------------------------------------\n+        // Convert reduced values to native type T\n+        int32x4_t tSum[kAtoms];\n+        for(int i = 0; i < kAtoms; i++)\n+        {\n+            if constexpr(cast_bf2half)\n+            {\n+                const half2* half_buf = reinterpret_cast<const half2*>(&tA[i]);\n+                nv_bfloat162 bf16_buf[4];\n+#pragma unroll\n+                for(int j = 0; j < 4; ++j)\n+                {\n+                    float2 f    = __half22float2(half_buf[j]);\n+                    bf16_buf[j] = __float22bfloat162_rn(f);\n+                }\n+                tSum[i] = *reinterpret_cast<const int32x4_t*>(bf16_buf);\n+            }\n+            else\n+            {\n+                tSum[i] = tA[i];\n+            }\n+        }\n+\n+        // --------------------------------------------------------\n+        // Add residual_inp\n+        BufferResource res_in_buffer(const_cast<T*>(residual_inp), N * sizeof(T));\n+        uint32_t res_offset = block * kTileSize + thread * sizeof(int32x4_t);\n+        int32x4_t tResIn[kAtoms];\n+\n+        for(int i = 0; i < kAtoms; i++)\n+        {\n+            tResIn[i] = buffer_load_dwordx4(res_in_buffer.descriptor, res_offset, 0, 0);\n+            res_offset += kAtomStride * sizeof(int32x4_t);\n+            packed_assign_add<T>(&tSum[i], &tResIn[i]);\n+        }\n+\n+        // --------------------------------------------------------\n+        // Write sum to residual_out\n+        BufferResource res_out_buffer(residual_out, N * sizeof(T));\n+        uint32_t res_out_offset = block * kTileSize + thread * sizeof(int32x4_t);\n+\n+        for(int i = 0; i < kAtoms; i++)\n+        {\n+            buffer_store_dwordx4(tSum[i], res_out_buffer.descriptor, res_out_offset, 0, 0);\n+            res_out_offset += kAtomStride * sizeof(int32x4_t);\n+        }\n+\n+        // --------------------------------------------------------\n+        // Compute sum of squares for each row\n+        float local_sum_sq[32] = {0.0f};\n+        uint32_t const num_rows = 16384 / hidden_dim;\n+        uint32_t const block_start_idx = block * 16384;\n+\n+        for(int i = 0; i < kAtoms; i++)\n+        {\n+            uint32_t elem_idx = block_start_idx + thread * 8 + i * 2048;\n+            if (elem_idx >= N) continue;\n+\n+            uint32_t row_idx = (thread * 8 + i * 2048) / hidden_dim;\n+            if (row_idx >= 32) continue;\n+\n+            const T* elems = reinterpret_cast<const T*>(&tSum[i]);\n+#pragma unroll\n+            for(int j = 0; j < 8; j++)\n+            {\n+                float val = qr_to_float<T>(elems[j]);\n+                local_sum_sq[row_idx] += val * val;\n+            }\n+        }\n+\n+        // Reduce within wavefront (64 threads)\n+        for (int offset = 32; offset > 0; offset /= 2)\n+        {\n+            for (uint32_t r = 0; r < num_rows; r++)\n+            {\n+                if (r < 32)\n+                {\n+                    local_sum_sq[r] += __shfl_xor(local_sum_sq[r], offset, 64);\n+                }\n+            }\n+        }\n+\n+        // Shared memory to accumulate wavefront sums.\n+        __shared__ float s_sum_sq[32][4];\n+        __shared__ float s_denom[32];\n+\n+        int lane_id = thread % 64;\n+        int warp_id = thread / 64;\n+\n+        if (thread < 32)\n+        {\n+            s_denom[thread] = 0.0f;\n+            for (int w = 0; w < 4; w++)\n+            {\n+                s_sum_sq[thread][w] = 0.0f;\n+            }\n+        }\n+        __syncthreads();\n+\n+        if (lane_id == 0)\n+        {\n+            for (uint32_t r = 0; r < num_rows; r++)\n+            {\n+                if (r < 32)\n+                {\n+                    s_sum_sq[r][warp_id] = local_sum_sq[r];\n+                }\n+            }\n+        }\n+\n+        __syncthreads();\n+\n+        if (thread < num_rows && thread < 32)\n+        {\n+            float sum = 0.0f;\n+            for (int w = 0; w < 4; w++)\n+            {\n+                sum += s_sum_sq[thread][w];\n+            }\n+            s_denom[thread] = rsqrtf(sum / (float)hidden_dim + eps);\n+        }\n+\n+        __syncthreads();\n+\n+        // --------------------------------------------------------\n+        // Load weights\n+        BufferResource weight_buffer(const_cast<T*>(weight), hidden_dim * sizeof(T));\n+        int32x4_t tWeight[kAtoms];\n+        for(int i = 0; i < kAtoms; i++)\n+        {\n+            uint32_t weight_offset = ((thread * 8 + i * 2048) % hidden_dim) * sizeof(T);\n+            tWeight[i] = buffer_load_dwordx4(weight_buffer.descriptor, weight_offset, 0, 0);\n+        }\n+\n+        // --------------------------------------------------------\n+        // Scale and write output\n+        int32x4_t tOut[kAtoms];\n+        for(int i = 0; i < kAtoms; i++)\n+        {\n+            uint32_t row_idx = (thread * 8 + i * 2048) / hidden_dim;\n+            float denom = (row_idx < 32) ? s_denom[row_idx] : 0.0f;\n+\n+            const T* sum_elems = reinterpret_cast<const T*>(&tSum[i]);\n+            const T* w_elems = reinterpret_cast<const T*>(&tWeight[i]);\n+            T out_elems[8];\n+\n+#pragma unroll\n+            for(int j = 0; j < 8; j++)\n+            {\n+                float val = qr_to_float<T>(sum_elems[j]);\n+                float w_val = qr_to_float<T>(w_elems[j]);\n+                out_elems[j] = qr_from_float<T>(val * denom * w_val);\n+            }\n+            tOut[i] = *reinterpret_cast<const int32x4_t*>(out_elems);\n+        }\n+\n+        BufferResource dst_buffer(output, N * sizeof(T));\n+        uint32_t dst_offset = block * kTileSize + thread * sizeof(int32x4_t);\n+\n+        for(int i = 0; i < kAtoms; i++)\n+        {\n+            buffer_store_dwordx4(tOut[i], dst_buffer.descriptor, dst_offset, 0, 0);\n+            dst_offset += kAtomStride * sizeof(int32x4_t);\n+        }\n     }\n };\n \n \n","additions":286,"deletions":9},"truncated":false},"title":"app/aiter/csrc/include/quick_all_reduce.cuh","time":{"start":1784415116687,"end":1784415116690}},"id":"prt_f776ddd6f001JKPahJxzhTQ5Xy","sessionID":"ses_088953fe5ffenAXvBM3qI45Ue3","messageID":"msg_f776daa25001JC4YMw8UgDtJpC"}}

{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1784415294596,"sessionID":"ses_088953fe5ffenAXvBM3qI45Ue3","part":{"type":"tool","tool":"write","callID":"call_6d5bbb31e02e4aeb80d||thought_signature||","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"filePath":"/tmp/opencode/benchmark_fused.py","content":"# SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\n# Copyright (C) 2026, Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. All rights reserved.\n\nimport os\nimport multiprocessing as mp\nimport torch\nimport torch.distributed as dist\nimport aiter as ops\nfrom aiter.dist.utils import get_distributed_init_method, get_ip, get_open_port\n\ndef _benchmark_worker(\n    rank: int,\n    world_size: int,\n    tokens: int,\n    hidden_dim: int,\n    dtype: torch.dtype,\n    distributed_init_method: str,\n):\n    device = torch.device(f\"cuda:{rank}\")\n    torch.cuda.set_device(device)\n    ptr = None\n    try:\n        dist.init_process_group(\n            backend=\"nccl\",\n            init_method=distributed_init_method,\n            rank=rank,\n            world_size=world_size,\n        )\n        group = dist.new_group(list(range(world_size)), backend=\"nccl\")\n\n        ptr = ops.init_custom_qr(rank, world_size, None)\n        handle = ops.qr_get_handle(ptr)\n        handles = [None] * world_size\n        dist.all_gather_object(handles, handle, group=group)\n        ops.qr_open_handles(ptr, handles)\n\n        inp = torch.randn((tokens, hidden_dim), dtype=dtype, device=device) * 0.1\n        residual_inp = torch.randn((tokens, hidden_dim), dtype=dtype, device=device) * 0.1\n        weight = torch.randn((hidden_dim,), dtype=dtype, device=device) * 0.1\n        eps = 1e-6\n\n        # Fused buffers\n        fused_out = torch.empty_like(inp)\n        fused_residual_out = torch.empty_like(residual_inp)\n\n        # Unfused buffers\n        unfused_ar_out = torch.empty_like(inp)\n        unfused_out = torch.empty_like(inp)\n        unfused_residual_out = torch.empty_like(residual_inp)\n\n        # Align ranks and warm up\n        dist.all_reduce(torch.zeros(1, device=device), group=group)\n        torch.cuda.synchronize()\n\n        # Warmup fused\n        for _ in range(20):\n            ops.qr_all_reduce_rmsnorm(\n                ptr, inp, residual_inp, fused_residual_out, fused_out, weight, eps, hidden_dim, 0, False\n            )\n        torch.cuda.synchronize()\n\n        # Warmup unfused\n        for _ in range(20):\n            ops.qr_all_reduce(ptr, inp, unfused_ar_out, 0, False)\n            ops.rmsnorm2d_fwd_with_add(unfused_out, unfused_ar_out, residual_inp, unfused_residual_out, weight, eps)\n        torch.cuda.synchronize()\n\n        # Benchmark fused\n        start_evt_fused = torch.cuda.Event(enable_timing=True)\n        end_evt_fused = torch.cuda.Event(enable_timing=True)\n        start_evt_fused.record()\n        for _ in range(200):\n            ops.qr_all_reduce_rmsnorm(\n                ptr, inp, residual_inp, fused_residual_out, fused_out, weight, eps, hidden_dim, 0, False\n            )\n        end_evt_fused.record()\n        torch.cuda.synchronize()\n        fused_time_ms = start_evt_fused.elapsed_time(end_evt_fused) / 200.0\n\n        # Benchmark unfused\n        start_evt_unfused = torch.cuda.Event(enable_timing=True)\n        end_evt_unfused = torch.cuda.Event(enable_timing=True)\n        start_evt_unfused.record()\n        for _ in range(200):\n            ops.qr_all_reduce(ptr, inp, unfused_ar_out, 0, False)\n            ops.rmsnorm2d_fwd_with_add(unfused_out, unfused_ar_out, residual_inp, unfused_residual_out, weight, eps)\n        end_evt_unfused.record()\n        torch.cuda.synchronize()\n        unfused_time_ms = start_evt_unfused.elapsed_time(end_evt_unfused) / 200.0\n\n        if rank == 0:\n            print(f\"Shape: {tokens}x{hidden_dim}, dtype: {dtype}\")\n            print(f\"Unfused (AllReduce + RMSNorm) avg time: {unfused_time_ms * 1000:.2f} us\")\n            print(f\"Fused (AllReduceRMSNorm) avg time:     {fused_time_ms * 1000:.2f} us\")\n            speedup = (unfused_time_ms - fused_time_ms) / unfused_time_ms * 100\n            print(f\"Fused is {speedup:.2f}% faster\")\n    finally:\n        if ptr is not None:\n            ops.qr_destroy(ptr)\n        if dist.is_initialized():\n            dist.destroy_process_group()\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    world_size = 2\n    tokens = 65536\n    hidden_dim = 4096\n    dtype = torch.bfloat16\n\n    distributed_init_method = get_distributed_init_method(get_ip(), get_open_port())\n    ctx = mp.get_context(\"spawn\")\n    p0 = ctx.Process(target=_benchmark_worker, args=(0, world_size, tokens, hidden_dim, dtype, distributed_init_method))\n    p1 = ctx.Process(target=_benchmark_worker, args=(1, world_size, tokens, hidden_dim, dtype, distributed_init_method))\n\n    p0.start()\n    p1.start()\n    p0.join()\n    p1.join()\n"},"output":"Wrote file
